description: Review digests should provide a usable synthesis with at least one highlight.

output.title: Weekly review digest
output.summary: This week surfaced a strong river restoration grant lead and a new archive-ready stewardship update.
output.whyItMatters: The coop can move one funding lead forward while capturing a durable record of recent progress.
output.suggestedNextStep: Review the highlights together and assign who will advance the funding lead.
highlights: River restoration climate resilience grant opened for applications.
Stewardship notes are ready to archive after the field visit.
